Index.title: Uncover the Secrets of Every Thread.
Index.subtitle: Advanced AI fabric analysis. Get thread density, warp, weft, and material composition data in seconds.
Index.productDescription: ThreadCounty is a comprehensive AI-powered platform designed to replace manual fabric inspection. By leveraging advanced computer vision, our software instantly analyzes macroscopic fabric images to determine thread density, warp and weft counts, and material composition with unparalleled precision.
Index.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to automate quality control and fabric analysis.
Index.f1Desc: Ask questions naturally using our built-in AI assistant with Speech Recognition.
Index.f2Desc: Install ThreadCounty on any device and access it anywhere, anytime.
Index.f3Desc: Client-side image compression and built-in Tesseract OCR for fabric tags.
Index.f4Desc: Dynamically compare past analysis reports side-by-side in the dashboard.
Index.f5Desc: Available in English and Spanish with seamless route-based localization.
Index.f6Desc: Receive instant email updates when your AI fabric analysis is complete.
Index.howItWorksSub: Three simple steps to transform your quality control.
Index.step1Desc: Take a macroscopic photo of your fabric and upload it securely.
Index.step2Desc: Our neural networks analyze the thread structure instantly.
Index.step3Desc: Download detailed reports with density, type, and actionable suggestions.
Index.testimonialsSub: Hear from our early beta testers.
Index.faq1Q: How accurate is the AI Analysis?
Index.faq1A: Our computer vision system is designed to provide highly accurate metrics for thread density, warp/weft counts, and material identification under standard macro-photography conditions.
Index.faq2A: We currently support JPG, JPEG, and PNG formats. Best results require at least 1024x1024 resolution.
Index.ready: Ready to Transform Your Quality Control?
Index.readySub: Contact our sales team today to learn how ThreadCounty can be integrated into your existing manufacturing pipeline.
